title: BGP Simulator
description: A Border Gateway Protocol simulator that models how routers exchange routing information across autonomous systems.

title: Cyber-Plague
description: Lateral movement simulator that models malware propagation across a 100,000+ node enterprise network using hierarchical Up/Across/Down traversal and policy-based conflict resolution — analogous to BGP route selection.

title: Personal Website
description: This personal website — built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features a Conway's Game of Life homepage, dynamic project board, and auto-updating resume viewer.
